---
name: Visualization Theme Request
about: Suggest a new visual theme for the office UI
title: "[Theme] "
labels: theme
assignees: ''
---

**Theme name**
e.g. Cyberpunk, Minimalist, Studio Ghibli-inspired...

**Description**
What vibe / aesthetic are you going for?

**Reference images**
Links or screenshots of the style you have in mind.

**Would you like to contribute it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to build this theme
- [ ] No, just a suggestion
